title: Iwebhusayithi ye-IATF
summary: Isayithi lomphakathi le-International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: I-IATF yayidinga indlu yomphakathi ezinzile echaza imodeli, ibala amaphrojekthi, futhi ikhombe abanikelayo esinyathelweni esilandelayo esifanele.
why: Le sayithi ingumnyango wangaphambili womphakathi we-IATF. Yakhiwe njengephrojekthi encane engaguquki ngakho-ke ihlala kulula ukuyifunda, ukuyihumusha, nokuyigcina ivulekile.
scopeIn: Amakhasi okufika omphakathi achaza imodeli ye-IATF
Irejista yomphakathi yamaphrojekthi we-IATF amukelwe, asebenzayo, futhi agciniwe ngesimo, umgcini, indawo yokugcina, nedemo
Amakhasi okuphathwa kanye nokwenza izinto obala
Ukuthumela Static on Abasebenzi Cloudflare Static Amafa
scopeOut: Izindawo zamalungu ezizimele, ama-akhawunti, noma ukugeleza kokungena ngemvume
Ukusingathwa kwekhodi yomthombo wephrojekthi, ehlala endaweni yokugcina yeprojekthi ngayinye
Ukulandelela udaba kumaphrojekthi ngamanye, okuhlala endaweni yokugcina ye-GitHub yeprojekthi ngayinye

title: I-selfie ye-IATF
summary: Uhlobo lokuqala lwe-IATF, olwalugcinwe ngemuva kokufinyelela endaweni yokuma yemvelo.
problem: Ukuhlola okusheshayo kwethuluzi eligxile ekufinyeleleni ngaphansi kwesambulela se-IATF.
why: Indawo yokugcina igcinwa esidlangalaleni njengerekhodi lomsebenzi, yize ukuthuthukiswa okusebenzayo kumisiwe.
scopeIn: I-prototype yokuqala yethuluzi eligxile ekufinyeleleni egcinwe njengerekhodi lomphakathi

title: Imithombo ye-IATF
summary: I-bot yomphakathi we-IATF, igcinwe ngemuva kokufinyelela endaweni yokuma yemvelo.
why: Indawo yokugcina igcinwa esidlangalaleni njengerekhodi lomsebenzi, yize ukuthuthukiswa okusebenzayo kumisiwe.
scopeIn: Ukungavumelani okuzenzakalelayo kuzungeze iziteshi zomphakathi ze-IATF, kugcinwe njengerekhodi lomphakathi
